status: frozen on three Gemini A2 development rounds on 2026-07-16; do not tune on held-out
scope: Ground-truth-free runtime checks over one alert package and one LLM triage output.

S001_HIGH_CONSEQUENCE_ACTION.description: The proposed action is terminal or disruptive and requires human approval.

S002_AGGRESSIVE_CLAIM.description: The output makes an aggressive claim or proposes aggressive handling.

S003_BENIGN_CLOSURE.description: A benign closure needs affirmative trusted context that the neutral package may not carry.

integrity_only.description: Block observable contract violations; otherwise pass without conservative routing.

consequence_gate.description: Recommended deployment profile: review terminal or disruptive actions.

safety_first.description: High-recall profile: review aggressive claims and benign closures.

non_claims: The policy does not infer the benchmark evidence condition.
The policy does not prove that a verdict is factually correct.
A pass means no policy-verifiable issue was found, not that ground truth agrees.
